# Primegate Consultancy

> Dubai-based international education advisory and management consulting firm. Primegate connects the world's leading universities with high-intent students across the Middle East, South Asia, Southeast Asia, CIS and Africa; guides students studying abroad or within the Gulf; supports education agents; and helps entrepreneurs and companies establish and grow in the UAE. Founded 2025, built on 30 years of personal, founder-led expertise. Based at Meydan, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

## What Primegate does (four advisory areas)
- [For Universities](https://primegateconsultancy.com/for-universities.html): Primegate acts as a trusted, exclusive international recruitment partner for universities - carrying the marketing and recruitment across the Middle East, South Asia, Southeast Asia, CIS and Africa, and delivering verified, high-intent, compliance-vetted students to the international office.
- [Study Abroad](https://primegateconsultancy.com/study-abroad.html): Personal, founder-led guidance for students leaving the Middle East to study in the UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Europe and Asia-Pacific - shortlisting, applications, scholarships, offers and visas.
- [Study in the Middle East](https://primegateconsultancy.com/study-in-middle-east.html): Advisory for international students choosing the Gulf - NYU Abu Dhabi, Sorbonne, Heriot-Watt, Georgetown Qatar and 60+ accredited institutions in a tax-free, multicultural region.
- [Management Consulting](https://primegateconsultancy.com/management-consulting.html): Business setup and company formation in the UAE - mainland and free zone formation (IFZA, Meydan, DMCC, RAKEZ), trade licensing, PRO and government services, investor and employment visas, corporate and private banking introductions, management training, and web development and digital marketing.

## Other pages
- [About Primegate](https://primegateconsultancy.com/about.html): The founder-led story and advisory philosophy.
- [For Agents](https://primegateconsultancy.com/partner-with-us.html): A channel partner programme for education agents and sub-agents.
- [Contact](https://primegateconsultancy.com/contact.html): Reach a real advisor; response within one working day.

## Key facts
- Name: Primegate Consultancy
- Founded: 2025
- Headquarters: Meydan Grandstand, 6th Floor, Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, UAE
- Email: info@primegateconsultancy.com
- Phone: +971 55 312 9798
- Markets served: UAE and GCC, South Asia, Southeast Asia, CIS, Sub-Saharan Africa
- Differentiator: founder-led, selective, compliance-first; depth of relationship over volume.
